expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly frames the Phase 1 objective as capturing "Google Sheets export entry points", "scope boundaries", and "format constraints" "before any scenario drafting" (Section 1). It also structures the deliverable into those exact categories (Section 3: A/B/C) and confirms "No scenarios drafted" (Section 4).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The document is titled "QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 1 (Context Intake)" and states "Primary phase under test: phase1 (context intake; pre-scenario drafting)". It avoids scenario creation ("No scenarios drafted") and stays within intake/blocked status and requests for evidence (Sections 2, 4, 5), consistent with phase1 behavior.
